plugins.name: automation
plugins.description: Provides the shared software development skills that enforce conventions and code style in Ataraxis and derived projects.

plugins.name: video
plugins.description: Provides camera acquisition, video recording, log processing, and pipeline orchestration skills for ataraxis-video-system. Includes MCP bindings for interactive camera discovery, testing, and session management.

plugins.name: communication
plugins.description: Provides microcontroller discovery, extraction configuration, log processing, and pipeline orchestration skills for ataraxis-communication-interface. Includes MCP bindings for hardware discovery, manifest management, and batch data processing.

plugins.name: microcontroller
plugins.description: Provides firmware module implementation skills for ataraxis-micro-controller.
